name: Passare Funeral Home Management API
what_it_does: Passare REST API for funeral home management and planning platform. Enables AI agents to manage case and family records, handle arrangement conference workflows, process preneed contracts, manage inventory and merchandise selection, handle at-need and preneed financial data, integrate with death certificate filing systems, coordinate with cremation and burial providers, and automate family communication workflows.
use_cases: Managing funeral case records and family profiles from funeral operations agents
Processing arrangement conference workflows from funeral planning agents
Handling preneed contract management from aftercare planning agents
Integrating case data with state death registration systems from compliance agents
not_for: Healthcare end-of-life without funeral home operational workflows
Cemetery management without funeral home arrangement focus
Memorial event planning without death care regulatory compliance
best_when: A funeral home or funeral group using Passare wants AI agents to automate case management, family communication, arrangement workflows, and regulatory compliance documentation.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Deceased and bereaved family personal data is highly sensitive and subject to state funeral home regulations. Death care data requires exceptional care and sensitivity in automated workflows.

auth.notes: Passare uses API key and OAuth 2.0. Funeral home-level credentials. Partner program for integration developers. API access for approved third-party integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — funeral home management SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly pricing for funeral homes
pricing.notes: Abilene, Texas company. Founded 2013. Death care specific platform with collaboration tools for families. 3,000+ funeral home locations. Includes online obituary and planning tools for bereaved families.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Deceased and bereaved family data requires exceptional sensitivity and care
No public MCP server — REST API with partner program
No webhooks — requires polling for case status updates
State funeral home regulations vary — automated workflows must respect regulatory requirements
Death certificate filing integration has strict state-specific requirements
Preneed contract financial data is subject to state trust fund regulations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Deceased and bereaved family data with extreme sensitivity. SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. State funeral home regulatory compliance required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Deceased and bereaved family data. SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. Extremely sensitive data context.
